mapper.select: SELECT id, email, email_verified, phone, phone_verified, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, role, status, register_source, token_version, last_active_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT id, email, email_verified, phone, phone_verified, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, role, status, register_source, token_version, last_active_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, email, phone, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, role, status, register_source, token_version, last_active_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, email_verified, phone, phone_verified, password_hash, nickname, register_source, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{email}, 0, #{phone}, #{phoneVerified}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{registerSource}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email_verified = #{emailVerified}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, token_version = token_version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, email_verified, phone, phone_verified, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, role, status, register_source, token_version, last_active_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET phone_verified = #{phoneVerified}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
